nasb.text: and you have perseverance and have endured for My name’s sake, and have not grown weary.

esv.text: I know you are enduring patiently and bearing up for my name’s sake, and you have not grown weary.

cnv.text: 你有忍耐，曾為我的名的緣故忍受一切，並不困倦。

ccb.text: 你曾坚定不移地为我的名受苦，没有气馁。

csbs.text: 你也有忍耐，曾为我的名劳苦，并不疲乏。
